offer_data: People-first culture: Real ownership: This is a rare opportunity to build an IT function from scratch in a fast-growing technology company.

Flexibility and trust: We trust you to manage your time. Enjoy flexible working hours and hybrid work options. You’ll have access to top-notch tools and software, and yes, you’re welcome to use our equipment (including 3D printers) for your own hobby or DIY projects.

Continuous learning: We support your growth. From training programs to literature of your choice, we want every team member to keep developing their skills and stay curious – especially in emerging areas like AI and automation.

offer_data: An interesting expert position in a stimulating and motivated work community.

The city of Rovaniemi supports the staff's well-being at work with, for example, sports and culture benefits and various offers aimed at the staff. Flexible working hours enable flexible coordination of work and own expenses.

expect_data: Ability to understand and respect the individual needs of each child.
Developing work style and flexibility in changing everyday life
What we expect from you
offer_data: Professional work community: With us, you work in a professional work community where everyone's contribution is valued. We support each other and our aim is to create a positive atmosphere together.

Opportunity for professional development: We offer opportunities for developing your own skills and training. You get to participate in various early special education meetings, where we collegially share our expertise and consider operating methods and various methods to create a flexible and purposeful everyday life.

The city of Riihimäki invests in front-line skills, so that those who work for us can say that they receive good management. You can get support for your work from the director of the early childhood education unit and special early childhood education teachers. Your supervisor takes the operation forward with a developing approach and encourages his employees to implement new ideas.
Good occupational health care services at Terveystalo.
